description_long: This sleek sports car features a low, aerodynamic profile with a glossy black exterior finish. The front end is characterized by smooth, rounded contours, integrated headlights, and a subtle grille, while the rear showcases modern taillights and dual exhausts. The side view reveals a two-door coupe design with flush door handles, sculpted body lines, and large, black alloy wheels with yellow brake calipers. The windows are tinted, and the roofline gently slopes towards the rear, emphasizing its sporty character. The car sits close to the ground, enhancing its performance-oriented stance. Overall, the design exudes luxury, speed, and modern engineering.
description: A glossy black, low-profile sports car with sculpted lines, tinted windows, and large black alloy wheels. Its aerodynamic coupe design and modern details highlight luxury and performance.
description_view_0: Front view shows rounded contours, integrated headlights, and a subtle grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the coupe's two-door design, sculpted body, and large black wheels with yellow calipers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays modern taillights, dual exhausts, and a sloping roofline.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the sleek profile, tinted windows, and prominent wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke black alloy wheels with yellow brake calipers
